overview: Bamm Book Builder is a children's book creation platform that helps authors produce KDP-ready print-on-demand books. Users create projects, write pages, upload illustrations, build covers, and export print-ready PDFs that meet Amazon KDP specifications.
features: KDP-compliant interior PDF export with full-bleed pages
Full-wrap cover PDF with dynamic spine width calculation
Page editor with image upload and text overlay
Cover builder with front, back, and spine panels
Subscription gating with Stripe billing integration
Admin backdoor for testing without subscription
Boho/Montessori landing page with earthy palette
